items.title: California of Europe: Vineyards, Resorts, and 100 Miles of Coastline
items.summary: Portugal features scenic rolling vineyards, luxury resorts, and extensive coastline attracting international travelers.

items.title: Foreign Travel Demand Drives Portugal Tourism Growth Among International Visitors
items.summary: International visitor demand is driving tourism growth in Portugal despite domestic travel decline.
